title: Optimalsation
body:
### What Sets 'Optimax' / 'Optimalsation' Apart?

There's many modpacks that have optimization mods in them but they're either bloated with other additional content unrelated to performance or they only have a few mods.

This modpack is a all-in-one of every FPS mod as long as they're 1) compatible with each other and 2) it actually helps performance (some mods don't have the results they claim or another mod does something similar but better)

### Shaders & RTX

The mod also includes performance-friendly shaders with further optimizations so if you wanted to use shaders during gameplay try them out!

### Research & Testing

Months testing different combinations of incompatible FPS mods to see which ones gives the greatest performance went into this and I can confidently say that this exact combination is the smoothest way to play newer versions of Minecraft.

### Categories / Type / Tiers / Versions

**FPS Only**
- Includes ONLY mods that boost performance

**FPS + QoL**
- Includes all the mods the 'FPS Only' version does (FPS boosting) but also adds some basic common quality of life mods most players add to their own modpacks that DON'T effect gameplay (e.g, Mouse Tweaks)

**FPS + QoL + Tweaks**
- Includes all the mods the 'FPS + QoL' version does (FPS boosting & QoL) but also adds some mods that may affect gameplay, however these mods don't add additional content to the game, they may change existing vanilla content/mechanics slightly to be more user friendly

### Permissions

I've designed this modpack into these categories so people can either use these mods themselves to enjoy the game, or so they can use this modpack as a baseline to create their own modpack. I thereby grant other authors to upload their own modpacks using  this as a baseline/foundation, I do ask for credit so other people can find the source however it's not required

### Benchmarks

**Optimax / Optimalsation**

Average: 650

Peak: [960](https://imgur.com/a/TAZu1nI)

**Simply Optimized**

Average: [550](https://imgur.com/rS17t3G)

Peak: [640](https://imgur.com/0LA0740)

**Adrenaline**

Average: 540

Peak: 630

**Additive**

Average: 495

Peak: 580

**Fabulously Optimized**

Average: 450

Peak: [572](https://imgur.com/9jRo4Cx)

**Sodium Plus**

Average: 225

Peak: 285

Feel free to add your own non-performance mods to the list for gameplay tweaks after you install, enjoy :)

### Addition Links

I also own a performance tweaking subreddit, feel free to join for optimization guides for other games: https://www.reddit.com/r/OptimizedGaming/
